title: Pod Conditions — Built-in Pod conditions
text:
Kubernetes manages the following Pod conditions:
Lifecycle conditions
: set as a Pod progresses through its lifecycle, roughly in this order:
PodScheduled
,
PodReadyToStartContainers
,
Initialized
,
ContainersReady
,
Ready
.
Other conditions
: set in response to specific operations or events:
DisruptionTarget
,
PodResizePending
,
PodResizeInProgress
.
In addition to the built-in conditions above, you can define custom conditions
using
Pod readiness gates
.
